title: UACP Reasoning Extension
description: Thinking content blocks for model reasoning. v0.3.2.

text.description: Reasoning content. May be empty. Hard limit: 1,000,000 Unicode codepoints.

model_visibility.description: visible: model output included reasoning by default; hidden: reasoning was generated but vendor did not surface; redacted: vendor returned a redacted summary only.

tokens.description: Token count for this thinking block (vendor-reported when available).
